title: Record earlier speculative buffer and background/read spectacle
prompt: Create reports/speculative-bg-read-spectacle.md with sections for Speculative buffer, Background bullets, Read-group bullets, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Speculative Bg Read Spectacle Contract

## Speculative buffer
pre-turn speculative step buffer defaults to 6k tokens so long sessions reclaim earlier before the next LLM step

## Background bullets
background agent status markers pulse/spectacular under ambient effects

## Read-group bullets
Read group headers pulse while pending and spectacular when complete

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + background-agent-status/strategy vitest + live TUI chrome
